case_title: JAMES SMITH ET AL VS. ALICIA LEW

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFFS JAMES SMITH AND MICHAELA PUCKO ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALICIA LEW IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,150.00 FILED BY SMITH, JAMES PUCKO, MICHAELA AS TO DEFENDANT LEW, ALICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-12-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JAMES SMITH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MICHAELA PUCKO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALICIA LEW IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. SERVICE WAS COMPLETED BY THE SF SHERIFF'S OFFICE BUT NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2889 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. THIS SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT INCLUDES PLUMBING, FLOODING, AND YARD CLEAN UP. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEP-12TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
